title: [3.7억] 4년 갈고 닦은 AI 자동화 시스템 - 블로그·스레드·전자책 by 블로리즘
notes: The right reward rail and the teal 재오픈 요청하기 button are Wadiz PLATFORM chrome, not 블로리즘's design. Palette fields describe the campaign-authored bands only — the boundary is unmarked in the capture (GAP-07). Style collector deferred (GAP-01): tiles captured at pageHeight 117039 versus styles.json pageHeight 130712 (drift 13673px); re-capture tiles + styles in one session before carrying class-C values. Curation: exemplar_role=negative because tile_00's acid-lime-on-black is a named banned default and signature.tell_risk contains palette-monotony; it is contrast-only.

tile_count.evidence: count of tile_*.jpg on disk (tile_00..tile_73); Wadiz has no capture.json

tile_scale.evidence: 720/1280 = 900/1600 = 0.5625; captures/README.md notes the JPEGs are 축소본

covered_height_px.evidence: 74 tiles × 1600px viewport height; 1600 is read off app-ui capture.json (11200/7), NOT recorded by this capture

has_dom.evidence: index.html is a generated view-capture.js viewer: its

value.role_note: black/charcoal ground floods the campaign image bands

dominant_60.evidence: tile_00.jpg hero band; tile_13.jpg story band

value.role_note: warm yellow in claim strips and highlight boxes
acid-lime reserved for the focal claim and the ∞ glyph

accent_10.evidence: tile_00.jpg '30분이면 자동 수익 세팅' + infinity glyph

field_committed.evidence: tile_00.jpg — full-bleed black hero band with acid-lime display type reversed out

hex_approx.evidence: tile_00.jpg hero ground — eyeball approximation, NOT a measurement
tile_00.jpg display type — JPEG chroma-subsampled + downscaled, so this reads LOW-biased (GAP-04)

chrome_excluded.evidence: Wadiz nav + teal CTA + reward rail are inside every tile and are unmarked; see notes.

pairing_note.value: Heavy geometric KR display sans (Black Han Sans class) against a light KR body; Latin numerals carry the authority row. Families NOT identified — no DOM, and a 0.5625 JPEG will not support an ID.

weight_contrast_observed.evidence: tile_00.jpg — display headline vs WAi summary body

content_width_px.evidence: story column measured against the Wadiz 860px platform default (korean-detailpage.md); not px-measured

column_system.value: single-column story body + persistent right reward rail on desktop (rail = platform chrome)

primitive_repeated.value: full-bleed claim band → evidence object → interpretation line
primitive_repeated.evidence: tile_00.jpg; matches the page-rhythm grammar in wadiz-ai-digital-benchmark.md

name.value: Acid-lime infinity loop on black — named banned default

description.value: A glowing acid-lime ∞ rendered as 3D tubing on a pure-black hero field below the display headline; it is the named acid-on-black banned default, not a signature technique to retrieve or imitate.

evidence_tiles.evidence: hero tile only — recurrence across the other 73 tiles not swept

embodies_brief.value: Automation = a loop that never stops. The glyph IS the promise, not decoration next to it.

tell_risk.evidence: tile_00.jpg shows the acid-lime-on-black signature. anti-ai-eval.js emits 'palette-monotony' for this palette pattern, whose source tell is the acid-green flood + near-black display named in anti-ai-tells.md tell #2.

notes.value: Two GIF assets in the story body — korean-detailpage.md's 'demonstrate dynamic features with GIF/video' rule is observed. Frame content unknown: GIFs are remote, not archived, not tiled.

awareness.evidence: Hero opens on mechanism + credential ('4년 노하우 압축', '30분이면 자동 수익 세팅') with no pain-agitation block; korean-detailpage.md maps that opening to solution-aware.

sophistication.evidence: Leads with proprietary mechanism + 4-year provenance rather than a bare superlative — korean-detailpage.md's stage-4 'claims exhausted' pivot.

arc.evidence: bodytext.txt — '혼자 하다가 막히면 어쩌죠?' (Maker Story opens on the reader's objection)
bodytext.txt — '이 질문을 가장 많이 받습니다. 걱정하지 마세요.'
data.json#/headings 'H3: 프로젝트 스토리'; tile_00.jpg WAi summary '30일 완성 AI 자동화 — 4년 노하우를 30일로 압축한 체계적 오더 가이드'

arc_resolved.evidence: count of arc[] stages with present !== null — 'narrow' is null (GAP-09)

arc_coverage.evidence: 5 present ÷ 5 resolved; 'narrow' is null, not false (a full 74-tile sweep was not run — GAP-09) and per §7's null rule joins neither numerator nor denominator

reward_ladder.evidence: tile_00.jpg reward rail; prices 790,000/890,000 corroborated in bodytext.txt

one_message.value: 4년치 AI 자동화 노하우를 30분 세팅으로 압축해 판다.
